tests.name: Complete Blood Count (CBC)
tests.description: A complete blood count (CBC) is a blood test that measures your red blood cells, white blood cells, and platelets. It's one of the most common blood tests and helps detect a wide range of disorders including anemia, infection, and blood cancers.
tests.seoDescription: Get CBC test at best prices. Complete Blood Count measures hemoglobin, RBC, WBC, platelets. Book online with home collection. Results in 24 hours.

faqs.question: How often should I get a CBC test?
faqs.answer: For healthy adults, annually as part of routine checkup. More frequently if you have chronic conditions.

faqs.question: Can CBC detect cancer?
faqs.answer: CBC can show abnormalities that may suggest blood cancers like leukemia, but it's not a definitive cancer test.

tests.name: Lipid Profile (Cholesterol Panel)
tests.description: A lipid profile measures the levels of fats and fatty substances in your blood, including total cholesterol, LDL, HDL, and triglycerides. It's essential for assessing cardiovascular disease risk.
tests.seoDescription: Book Lipid Profile test online. Measures cholesterol, LDL, HDL, triglycerides. Essential for heart health. Fasting required. Home collection available.

faqs.question: What is a good cholesterol level?
faqs.answer: Total cholesterol below 200 mg/dL, LDL below 100 mg/dL, HDL above 60 mg/dL, and triglycerides below 150 mg/dL are considered optimal.

faqs.question: How often should I check cholesterol?
faqs.answer: Every 4-6 years for healthy adults, more frequently if you have risk factors or are on cholesterol medication.

tests.name: HbA1c (Glycated Hemoglobin)
tests.description: HbA1c measures your average blood sugar levels over the past 2-3 months. It's the gold standard test for diagnosing diabetes and monitoring blood sugar control in diabetics.
tests.seoDescription: Book HbA1c test online. Measures 3-month average blood sugar. Essential for diabetes diagnosis & monitoring. No fasting required. Home collection available.
preparation: Can be done any time of day

faqs.question: What HbA1c level indicates diabetes?
faqs.answer: HbA1c of 6.5% or higher indicates diabetes. 5.7-6.4% indicates prediabetes.

faqs.question: How often should diabetics test HbA1c?
faqs.answer: Every 3 months if not at goal, every 6 months if stable and well-controlled.

tests.name: Thyroid Profile (T3, T4, TSH)
tests.description: A complete thyroid panel measures TSH, T3, and T4 hormones to evaluate thyroid function. It helps diagnose hypothyroidism, hyperthyroidism, and other thyroid disorders.
tests.seoDescription: Book Thyroid Profile test. Includes TSH, T3, T4. Diagnose thyroid disorders. No fasting needed. Home collection available. Results in 24 hours.
preparation: Take test in morning if on thyroid medication

tests.name: Liver Function Test (LFT)
tests.description: Liver function tests measure various enzymes and proteins in your blood to assess liver health. They help detect liver damage, hepatitis, cirrhosis, and monitor liver disease.
tests.seoDescription: Book Liver Function Test (LFT) online. Measures liver enzymes ALT, AST, ALP, bilirubin, albumin. Detect liver disease early. Home collection available.

tests.name: Kidney Function Test (KFT/RFT)
tests.description: Kidney function tests measure creatinine, BUN, and other markers to evaluate how well your kidneys are filtering waste from your blood. Essential for detecting kidney disease early.
tests.seoDescription: Book Kidney Function Test (KFT) online. Measures creatinine, BUN, uric acid, eGFR. Detect kidney disease early. Home collection available.

tests.name: Vitamin D (25-Hydroxy)
tests.description: Vitamin D test measures the level of 25-hydroxyvitamin D in your blood. Vitamin D deficiency is extremely common and linked to bone problems, fatigue, and weakened immunity.
tests.seoDescription: Book Vitamin D test online. Check 25-OH Vitamin D levels. Detect deficiency causing fatigue, bone pain. No fasting required. Home collection available.

tests.name: Vitamin B12
tests.description: Vitamin B12 test measures the level of this essential vitamin in your blood. B12 deficiency can cause anemia, nerve damage, fatigue, and cognitive problems.
tests.seoDescription: Book Vitamin B12 test online. Detect B12 deficiency causing fatigue, numbness, anemia. Essential for vegetarians. No fasting required.

tests.name: Iron Studies (Iron Profile)
tests.description: Iron studies measure serum iron, ferritin, TIBC, and transferrin saturation to evaluate iron status. It helps diagnose iron deficiency anemia and iron overload conditions.
tests.seoDescription: Book Iron Studies test online. Measures serum iron, ferritin, TIBC. Detect iron deficiency or overload. Fasting required. Home collection available.

tests.name: Urine Routine & Microscopy
tests.description: Urine routine examination analyzes the physical, chemical, and microscopic properties of urine. It screens for urinary tract infections, kidney disease, and diabetes.
tests.seoDescription: Book Urine Routine test online. Detects UTI, kidney problems, diabetes. No fasting required. Results in 24 hours. Affordable prices.

tests.name: High-Sensitivity CRP (hs-CRP)
tests.description: High-sensitivity C-reactive protein (hs-CRP) measures low levels of inflammation in the body. It's an important marker for cardiovascular disease risk assessment.
tests.seoDescription: Book hs-CRP test online. Measures inflammation and heart disease risk. Important cardiac marker. No fasting required. Home collection available.

tests.name: PSA (Prostate Specific Antigen)
tests.description: PSA test measures the level of prostate-specific antigen in blood. It's used to screen for prostate cancer and monitor treatment in men with prostate conditions.
tests.seoDescription: Book PSA test online. Screen for prostate cancer. Important for men over 50. No fasting required. Home collection available. Results in 24 hours.

tests.name: TSH (Thyroid Stimulating Hormone)
tests.description: TSH test measures the level of thyroid-stimulating hormone in blood. It's the first-line test for thyroid function and helps diagnose hypo or hyperthyroidism.
tests.seoDescription: Book TSH test online. First-line thyroid screening. Detect hypothyroidism or hyperthyroidism. No fasting required. Home collection available.

tests.name: Fasting Blood Glucose
tests.description: Fasting blood glucose measures blood sugar levels after an overnight fast. It's used to screen for diabetes and prediabetes.
tests.seoDescription: Book Fasting Blood Glucose test online. Screen for diabetes. 8-12 hour fasting required. Results same day. Home collection available.

tests.name: ESR (Erythrocyte Sedimentation Rate)
tests.description: ESR measures how quickly red blood cells settle at the bottom of a test tube. It's a non-specific marker of inflammation in the body.
tests.seoDescription: Book ESR test online. Measures inflammation levels. Non-specific marker for infections. No fasting required. Results same day.

tests.name: MRI Brain
tests.description: Brain MRI uses magnetic fields and radio waves to create detailed images of the brain. It helps diagnose tumors, strokes, infections, and other brain conditions without radiation.
tests.seoDescription: Book MRI Brain scan online. Detailed brain imaging without radiation. Diagnose tumors, strokes, MS. Compare prices from top centers.

tests.name: CT Scan Chest
tests.description: CT chest scan creates detailed cross-sectional images of the chest including lungs, heart, and blood vessels. Used to diagnose lung cancer, infections, and pulmonary conditions.
tests.seoDescription: Book CT Chest scan online. Detailed lung and chest imaging. Diagnose lung cancer, pneumonia, COVID. Compare prices from certified centers.
preparation: Avoid eating 4 hours before if contrast used

tests.name: Ultrasound Abdomen
tests.description: Abdominal ultrasound uses sound waves to visualize organs in the abdomen including liver, kidneys, gallbladder, pancreas, and spleen. It's safe, non-invasive, and radiation-free.
tests.seoDescription: Book Abdominal Ultrasound online. Visualize liver, kidney, gallbladder. No radiation. Fasting may be required. Home visit available in select areas.
preparation: Fast for 6-8 hours for upper abdomen

tests.name: PET-CT Scan
tests.description: PET-CT combines PET and CT scans to show both metabolic activity and detailed anatomy. It's the gold standard for cancer staging, detecting metastases, and monitoring treatment response.
tests.seoDescription: Book PET-CT scan online. Gold standard for cancer staging. Detect metastases. Compare prices from accredited PET-CT centers.

tests.name: Echocardiogram (2D Echo)
tests.description: Echocardiogram uses ultrasound to create images of the heart. It shows heart structure, valve function, and pumping efficiency. Essential for diagnosing heart conditions.
tests.seoDescription: Book Echocardiogram (2D Echo) online. Visualize heart function. Diagnose valve problems, heart failure. Non-invasive. Compare prices.

tests.name: ECG (Electrocardiogram)
tests.description: ECG records the electrical activity of the heart. It's a quick, painless test that helps detect heart rhythm problems, heart attacks, and other cardiac conditions.
tests.seoDescription: Book ECG test online. Quick heart rhythm check. Detect arrhythmias, heart attack signs. Results in minutes. Home ECG available.

tests.name: Hepatitis B Panel
tests.description: Hepatitis B panel tests for HBsAg, anti-HBs, anti-HBc to determine hepatitis B infection status, immunity, and whether vaccination is needed.
tests.seoDescription: Book Hepatitis B Panel online. Check HBsAg, antibodies. Detect active infection or immunity. Essential before vaccination. Home collection available.

tests.name: HIV 1 & 2 Test
tests.description: HIV test detects antibodies and/or antigens of HIV-1 and HIV-2. Modern 4th generation tests can detect infection as early as 2-4 weeks after exposure.
tests.seoDescription: Book confidential HIV test online. 4th generation HIV 1/2 test. Early detection within 2-4 weeks. Confidential results. Home collection available.
preparation: Window period: test 4 weeks after exposure

tests.name: ANA (Antinuclear Antibody) Test
tests.description: ANA test detects antibodies that attack the body's own tissues. It's used to screen for autoimmune disorders like lupus, rheumatoid arthritis, and Sjogren's syndrome.
tests.seoDescription: Book ANA test online. Screen for autoimmune disorders like lupus. Detects antinuclear antibodies. No fasting required. Home collection available.

tests.name: Allergy Panel (IgE)
tests.description: Allergy panel measures IgE antibodies to specific allergens including food, dust, pollen, and pet dander. Helps identify allergy triggers for proper management.
tests.seoDescription: Book Allergy Panel test online. Identify food, dust, pollen allergies. Measures specific IgE. No fasting required. Home collection available.
preparation: Do not stop antihistamines unless advised

tests.name: CA-125 (Ovarian Cancer Marker)
tests.description: CA-125 is a tumor marker primarily used to monitor ovarian cancer. It may also be elevated in other conditions including endometriosis and pelvic inflammatory disease.
tests.seoDescription: Book CA-125 test online. Ovarian cancer marker. Monitor treatment response. Important for women's health. No fasting required.

tests.name: Beta hCG (Pregnancy Test)
tests.description: Beta hCG blood test measures human chorionic gonadotropin hormone levels. It confirms pregnancy, monitors early pregnancy health, and is used in some cancer screenings.
tests.seoDescription: Book Beta hCG test online. Confirm pregnancy. More accurate than home tests. Monitor early pregnancy. Results same day. Home collection available.

tests.name: Stool Routine & Microscopy
tests.description: Stool examination checks for blood, parasites, bacteria, and digestive problems. It helps diagnose infections, malabsorption, and gastrointestinal bleeding.
tests.seoDescription: Book Stool Routine test online. Detect parasites, blood, infections. Essential for digestive health. Results in 24 hours. Home collection available.

tests.name: Testosterone (Total)
tests.description: Testosterone test measures the main male sex hormone. It's important for evaluating sexual function, fertility, and conditions like hypogonadism in men, and PCOS in women.
tests.seoDescription: Book Testosterone test online. Check hormone levels. Important for men's health, fertility, PCOS. Morning sample preferred. Home collection available.

tests.name: D-Dimer
tests.description: D-Dimer measures a protein fragment produced when blood clots dissolve. It's used to help rule out blood clots (DVT, pulmonary embolism) and monitor clotting disorders.
tests.seoDescription: Book D-Dimer test online. Rule out blood clots (DVT, PE). Important emergency marker. No fasting required. Results same day.

tests.name: Full Body Health Checkup
tests.description: Comprehensive health screening package including blood tests, imaging, and physical examination. Covers heart, liver, kidney, thyroid, diabetes, and more.
tests.seoDescription: Book Full Body Health Checkup online. 50+ tests including CBC, lipid, sugar, thyroid, liver, kidney. Best prices. Home collection available.
